title: Syncope
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Supports urgent cardiovascular assessment for ECG abnormality, heart failure, transient loss of consciousness during exertion, family history of sudden cardiac death, new or unexplained breathlessness, or a heart murmur.
red_flags.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-decided referral and escalation context.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports urgent cardiovascular assessment for ECG abnormality, heart failure, transient loss of consciousness during exertion, family history of sudden cardiac death, new or unexplained breathlessness, or a heart murmur.

examination.text: Supports event and witness history, posture, prodrome, appearance, movements, tongue biting, injury, duration, confusion, focal weakness, previous events, medical and family history, medicines, vital signs, lying and standing blood pressure, cardiovascular examination, and neurological signs.
examination.rationale: Supports mapped event, prodrome, position, duration, witness, associated symptom, focal-neurological, vital-sign, cardiovascular, neurological, preset, and history fields.

investigations.text: Supports clinician-performed or reviewed 12-lead ECG and selected additional tests such as glucose or haemoglobin when indicated by the assessment.

investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-performed or reviewed 12-lead ECG and selected additional tests such as glucose or haemoglobin when indicated by the assessment.

source_limitations: People younger than 16 years are outside the exact source.
Chest-pain negatives, oxygen saturation, hydration, electrolytes, troponin, generic clinician plans, and medication plans remain unsupported.
Clinical interpretation, driving eligibility, emergency disposition, and qualified clinician review remain clinician responsibilities.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
